summary: classifyAPIError passes through pre-typed *cliError instances unchanged instead of re-classifying via string-matching.
reason: The string-matching switch was clobbering usageErr/notFoundErr (returned from the envelope classifier) into apiErr/exit-5. Added a one-line errors.As guard at the top of the function. Filed as separate retro finding #1549.
validated_outcome: Smoke test: invalid cert exits 2; no-data exits 3
